content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to store graded curiosity traces from intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) in autonomous agents, where unexpected, low-prediction-accuracy exploratory encounters are prioritized for long-term retention over familiar, high-accuracy interactions. This creates a self-reinforcing cycle where an agent's intrinsic drive to explore automatically shapes its own memory structure to prioritize future curiosity-driven learning.
